steps.title: We determine the best VPN service
steps.detail: We compare providers, regions, and protocol constraints before committing to an option.

steps.title: We determine the price
steps.detail: The selected solver estimates setup cost and the expected execution window.

steps.title: Server selected, starting service deployment
steps.detail: Provisioning is in progress and the VPN service is being configured on the selected server.

steps.title: Delivery bundle prepared
steps.detail: The result package is assembled and waiting behind the protected result screen.

instructions.title: Open the protected result
instructions.detail: Unlock the solver result screen to reveal the connection package for your access mode.

instructions.title: Download the bundle
instructions.detail: Save the WireGuard or OpenVPN archive together with the QR image and backup credentials.

instructions.title: Import and connect
instructions.detail: Import the profile into your VPN client or scan the QR code on mobile, then verify connectivity.

widget.title: VPN service result
widget.summary: The service result is prepared and remains blurred until you choose how to continue.
